dimensions.label: Value
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: Steps are one-line labels with no explanation of WHY each works or HOW to execute - they read as a table of contents, not teachable IP.
what_to_strengthen: Expand each step to 3-5 sentences covering what it is, why it works, and the key action
Add at least one teaching framework to the bank with named components and concrete examples
Define 'Solopreneur OS' explicitly - what it contains, how it differs from a generic business checklist

dimensions.label: Authority
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: Wins are specific with dollar amounts and timelines, but the two intro slots (own_proof_intro, own_proof_specific_numbers) are empty - there's no narrative spine connecting these wins into a coherent authority arc.
what_to_strengthen: Fill own_proof_intro with the 2-3 sentence version of the authority narrative (broke to $320K, no team, no funnels)
Fill own_proof_specific_numbers with the headline stats pulled from wins
Add 2-3 proof-points (testimonials, case studies, or third-party validation) to round out self-reported revenue

dimensions.label: Point of View
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: POVs name beliefs and flips but several flips land as common sense rather than uncomfortable ('systems that fit your energy' and 'sell the result not the product' are widely held positions in creator-economy circles); entry 8 is an example placeholder.
what_to_strengthen: Sharpen flips 1 and 7 with specific counter-frameworks or named enemies - what exact playbook are you rejecting and why does it fail?
Remove or replace the example placeholder POV (entry 8) with a real one
Add the 'why the flip is correct' proof to each POV - entries are truncated before the evidence lands, so ensure full text is stored

dimensions.label: Connection
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: Micro-stories are genuinely specific with real emotional beats (crying on the phone to mum, quitting at 41K subs) and concrete numbers - strong raw material, but my_story_text is empty so there's no assembled narrative spine.
what_to_strengthen: Write my_story_text - the full origin story that sequences these micro-stories into a single arc
Fill story_audience_mapping to connect specific stories to specific audience pain points
Add 2-3 more sensory-detail stories from the pre-2020 period and the rebuilding months to fill the emotional middle of the timeline
